tier2_candidates.headline: CMS proposes 2.4% hospital pay increase, nationwide mandatory model rollout
tier2_candidates.snippet: The IPPS and LTCH Prospective Payment System proposed rule for FY2027 floats a roughly $1.4 billion annual rise in hospital payments, plus the first mandatory, nationwide test of an episode-based payment model—the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement Model.

tier2_candidates.headline: Proposed CMS rule would set prior auth deadlines for drugs
tier2_candidates.snippet: The Trump administration has issued a proposed rule that aims to significantly overhaul prior authorization for pharmaceuticals.

tier2_candidates.headline: HHS, after legal setback, updates ACIP charter to put more emphasis on vaccine safety

tier2_candidates.headline: Epic rolls out health alerts to flag rising rates of illness at the county level
tier2_candidates.snippet: Electronic health record giant Epic debuted a new feature that monitors county-level health trends and issues alerts when elevated rates of illness are detected.

tier2_candidates.headline: Benefits leaders report increased operational, financial costs amid 'digital health vendor sprawl': Solera survey
tier2_candidates.snippet: Forty-two percent of benefits leaders say they are managing eight or more digital health vendors, with 90% reporting spending more than $1 million annually on costs.

tier2_candidates.headline: Hospital M&A roars back to life in Q1 2026; Operating performances fray in February
tier2_candidates.snippet: The first quarter of 2026 extended a recovery from last year's dealmaking slowdown with 22 newly announced transactions, largely fueled by divestitures. Meanwhile, February benchmarking data outlined persistent operating pressures and soft volumes.

tier2_candidates.headline: Op-ed: Administrative fragility is costing healthcare more than we think
tier2_candidates.snippet: The industry has already proven automation works. The question now is whether organizations are prepared to operationalize it at scale, writes Zelis' Yusuf Qasim.

tier2_candidates.headline: Function Health acquires mobile healthcare platform Getlabs to provide members with at-home lab tests
tier2_candidates.snippet: Function’s testing platform is available at all Quest Diagnostics locations across the U.S. Members will soon be able to choose whether to visit a location or schedule an at-home or in-office test with Getlabs.

tier2_candidates.snippet: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.

tier2_candidates.headline: Vance leaves Pakistan talks with no deal. How financial markets are reacting.

tier2_candidates.snippet: Starting on April 20, the airline will limit passengers to one lithium battery-powered portable charger per person.
